DISCOVERY 302, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET ONE, MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES - ATTY. DONALD MAHNKE, ESQ FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. ATTY. KELLI HERZOG, ESQ., FOR THE DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO THIS MATTER BEING DECIDED BY A PRO TEM JUDGE. THE PRO TEM JUDGE, DEFENSE AND PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL (ALL APPEARING REMOTELY) AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF. ARGUMENTS ARE PRESENTED. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE DISCUSSION THIS MORNING AND SUBMIT TO MS. HORZOG FOR APPROVAL, AS TO FORM, AND THEN TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE IN WORD FORMAT, AND SEND TO RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM . TO THE EXTENT THAT MS. HERZOG DISAPPROVES SHE WILL SUBMIT A REDLINE COPY WITH THE CHANGES BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON MONDAY FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-23-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents Set One, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. Donald Mahnke, Esq., of QUILL & ARROW, LLP (Tel: 310) 933-4271) for the Plaintiff
Atty. Kelli Herzog, Esq., of GROTEFELD HOFFMANN LLP (Tel: 415.344.9670) for the Defendants

PLAINTIFF JOSE MENJIVAR'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents Set One.

Both parties stipulate to this matter being decided by a pro tem judge. The pro tem judge, defense and plaintiff's counsel (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.
Arguments are presented.

The Court overrules the litany of objections because they are not specific to the interrogatories; it is defenses' general view that all is irrelevant, vague and ambiguous.

Plaintiff to prepare a proposed order consistent with the discussion this morning and submit to Ms. Horzog for approval, as to form, and then to the pro tem judge in Word format, and send to rennepar85@gmail.com . To the extent that Ms. Herzog disapproves she will submit a redline copy with the changes by the close of business on Monday for the Court's review.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: R. Sahatjian, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents Set One
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Continued To May-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-17-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
